recipe_description: 15-bit pair table; ASCII alnum or underscore only, for vocabs that cannot supply enough clean tokens for a 16-bit table.
pair_lookup_rule: Zero-based line number equals the unsigned 15-bit value extracted from the input bitstream, MSB-first, in order. The final residual of 16..29 bits also indexes this table; residuals of 1..8 bits index the tail table instead.
tail_lookup_rule: Zero-based line number equals the unsigned 8-bit value decoded from the trailing residual bits of the input bitstream (left-padded with zero bits when fewer than 8).
selection_order: single-char [0-9A-Za-z] first in fixed ASCII sequence, then rank order
pair_selection_rule: entries immediately after the reserved tail slice, continuing for pair_table_size entries
